title: Ceballosia fruticosa
taxonomy: Ceballosia fruticosa is a species within the family Gentianaceae, a large family of flowering plants commonly known as gentians. This plant is native to Ecuador and is a member of the genus Ceballosia, which contains only a few species. The Gentianaceae family is part of the order Gentianales, a group of flowering plants that also includes the apocynaceae and loganiaceae families. The Gentianales order is within the larger clade of asterids, which also includes the ericales and lamiales orders. The Gentianaceae family, and thus Ceballosia fruticosa, is also part of the clade of flowering plants known as angiosperms.
